description: Create a content slide on the 2024 outlook using a two-column layout with survey question text on the left and horizontal stacked bar charts on the right comparing agree vs disagree, plus 2023 agree reference notes.

header.headline: Outlook for 2024
header.sub: Please indicate if you agree very much, agree somewhat, disagree somewhat or disagree very much with the following statements:

left.body: Base: 23,721 adults aged 18 years and older in India, 18-74 in Canada, Republic of Ireland, Malaysia, the Philippines, South Africa, Turkey, and the United States, 20-74 in Thailand, 21-74 in Indonesia and Singapore, and 16-74 in all other countries. Friday, October 25 – Friday November 8, 2024

labels: I will make some personal resolutions to do some specific things for myself or others in 2025 (2023 agree: 75%, no change)
I am optimistic that 2025 will be a better year for me than it was in 2024 (2023 agree: 70%, +1 pp)
My mental health will be better in 2025 than it was in 2024 (2023 agree: N/A)
My physical health will be better in 2025 than it was in 2024 (2023 agree: N/A)
In 2025 people in [COUNTRY] will start to feel more optimistic about the long-term future (2023 agree: N/A)
The global economy will be stronger in 2025 than it was in 2024 (2023 agree: 50%, +1 pp)
right.title: Global averages
